summary: False-positive resistance — temporal anchors. 'recent', 'before 2020', and 'this year' are bounded by clock time, not subjective judgement. The LLM MUST treat them as concrete date filters and NOT surface them for interpretation. Contrast: 'old' / 'outdated' would be subjective. The prompt has only one genuinely subjective term ('quality') which must surface.
opening_prompt: fetch all blog posts published before 2020 from https://example.com/feed.rss and use an LLM to grade their writing quality

phase5b_assertions.must_call_request_interpretation_review_: Lexical variants accepted: 'writing quality', 'quality of writing'.
phase5b_assertions.must_not_call_request_interpretation_rev: Temporal anchors and concrete nouns. The cutoff '2020' is a literal year. Surfacing 'before 2020' for interpretation would mean asking the user what year they mean by 2020 — absurd.

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
